summary: First test pass of DashCareer MVP. Backend: 11/11 pytest tests passed including auth, applications CRUD, documents CRUD, analytics overview, AI tools (real Claude calls for /optimize-resume + /suggestions returned 200 with valid content) and free-plan 10-app cap. Frontend: Landing renders headline + Start Free/View Demo + £0/£7 pricing + footer; Login shows 'Continue with Google'; Pricing page renders; with seeded session_token cookie all 4 protected dashboard sub-routes (Overview, Applications, Documents, AI Tools) load. Applications page renders all 4 Kanban columns (Applied/Interview/Accepted/Rejected) and the New Application dialog successfully creates an app ('PWTestCo') which appears in the board. AI Tools page renders 3 tabs (Resume Optimizer, Cover Letter, Suggestions).

issues: Footer reuses the hero headline verbatim ('The smarter way to manage applications.')—causes strict-mode duplicate text and is a minor copy duplication; consider a distinct tagline.

action_items: Optional: differentiate footer tagline from hero headline copy.
Optional: add data-testid attributes to Kanban columns / New-application save button to harden e2e selectors.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single 410-line file; acceptable for MVP but consider splitting into routers (auth/applications/documents/ai/analytics) as it grows.
auth/session uses synchronous `requests.get` inside async handler—will block the event loop under load; switch to httpx.AsyncClient.
Cookie is set with secure=True + samesite='none' which is correct for cross-site; ensure prod is always HTTPS (it is on emergentagent.com).

Free-plan AI quota counts attempts AFTER call_claude succeeds (log_ai_usage after await call_claude); if Claude fails the quota is not consumed (good) but failed attempts cost no quota even if they raised cost—acceptable.
No index on user_sessions.session_token / applications.user_id—add MongoDB indexes for scale.
PATCH /applications uses payload.model_dump() without exclude_none then filters None—works but exclude_unset would also allow explicit null updates if ever needed.
test_credentials: Emergent Google OAuth; testing uses seeded MongoDB session token per /app/auth_testing.md. Seeded user kept: user_id=test-user-1779017776927, token=test_session_1779017776927 (free plan).
seed_data_creation: Inserted one persistent test user + session via mongosh for browser tests; pytest fixtures create+cleanup their own TEST_-prefixed users/apps/docs/sessions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Protected routes live under /dashboard/applications, /dashboard/documents, /dashboard/ai-tools, /dashboard/settings (NOT top-level). Use the seeded cookie above or run the mongosh snippet in /app/auth_testing.md. Backend tests are in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py and need MONGO_URL+DB_NAME envs (defaults work). AI endpoints take ~5–10s—keep pytest timeout >=60s.
